name: CheckButtons

unions.name: Model
unions.comment: An opaque type representing state of check buttons.

values.name: addBottomButton
values.comment: Add an element onto the back of the check buttons.

values.name: addTopButton
values.comment: Prepend an element onto the front of the check buttons.

values.name: emptyModel
values.comment: A constructor for `Model`. It contains no buttons.

values.name: filter
values.comment: Keep only elements that satisfy the predicate.

values.name: getCheckedValues
values.comment: Get values of checked buttons.

values.name: getValues
values.comment: Get values of all check buttons.

values.name: map
values.comment: Apply a function to each check button.

values.name: setActive
values.comment: Make only buttons with provided values are active.

values.name: setChecked
values.comment: Make only buttons with provided values are checked.

values.name: setDisabled
values.comment: Make only buttons with provided values are disabled.

values.name: setUnchecked
values.comment: Make only buttons with provided values are unchecked.

values.name: view
values.comment:
A renderer for check buttons.

  The first argument is a name space for
  [elm-css](https://github.com/rtfeldman/elm-css).
  It is supposed to be a unique value.

  The second argument is button values currently checked. It is called if a user checked/unchecked any check button.
values.type: Namespace -> (List Value -> msg) -> Model -> Html msg

name: CheckButton

unions.name: Model
unions.comment:
An opaque type representing a check button state.
  To construct an actual value of this type, use constructors and modifiers bellow.

  Example usage.

  button =
    defaultModel "red" "Red"
    |> setChecked
    |> setDisabled

values.name: defaultModel
values.comment:
A constructor for a check button.
  By providing a value and a label name, you can construct an unchecked active button.

values.name: getIsActive
values.comment: Get if a check button is active.

values.name: getIsChecked
values.comment: Get if a check button is checked.

values.name: getLabel
values.comment: Get label name of a button.

values.name: getValue
values.comment: Get value of a button.

values.name: setActive
values.comment: Set the state of a check button to be active.

values.name: setChecked
values.comment: Set the state of a check button to be checked.

values.name: setDisabled
values.comment: Set the state of a check button to be disabled.

values.name: setIsChecked
values.comment:
Modify the state of a check button to be checked/unchecked.

  setChecked = setIsChecked True
  setUnchecked = setIsChecked False

values.name: setLabel
values.comment: Set a check button label name.

values.name: setUnchecked
values.comment: Set the state of a check button to be unchecked.

values.name: view
values.comment:
A renderer for check button.

  The first argument is a name space for
  [elm-css](https://github.com/rtfeldman/elm-css).
  It is supposed to be a unique value.

  The second argument is called if a user checked/unchecked a check button.

name: CheckButtons.Css

values.comment:
A CSS component.
Please reffer to the [elm-css](https://github.com/rtfeldman/elm-css) for detail.
